rulings.Case Title: SALLY LIU VS. JOSE CERON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Order Granting Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 9, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF SALLY LIU'S Motion To Set Aside Order Granting Summary Judgment GRANTED. Defendants addressed the motion on the merits in their opposition. July 1, 2015 Order Granting Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is VACATED. Defendant's Motion for Summary judgment is re-set for hearing for July 15, 2015. Plaintiff shall file her opposition no later than July 10, 2015. Reply, if any, shall be filed and served no later than July 13, 2015. = (501/GLW)

rulings.Case Title: WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. KAREN PARSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, July 9, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT KAREN PARSONS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. = (501/GLW)
